purpose: Fail-closed pattern set for future SpottingBoard classifier/review gate. This is not invoked by the first raw module insert loop, but should be attached before plant-local rules become runtime guidance or central candidates. v0.1.1 clarification: classifier may quarantine/downgrade at capture, but must not auto-review or auto-reject rows.

unsafe_or_contraindicated.note: Do not auto-set rejected/reviewed-reject at capture; supervisor review performs explicit rejection if warranted.

hard_blocks.reason: Rust/iron stains can darken, set, or worsen with chlorine bleach/oxidizers; rust belongs in controlled acid/chelator lane with product-specific warnings.
hard_blocks.required_display: Do not publish as staff guidance. Escalate for GONR review if operator disputes the guardrail.

hard_blocks.reason: HF/fluoride rust removers are severe-burn/toxicity chemistry and cannot be treated as routine consumer or unsupervised staff procedure.
hard_blocks.required_display: Professional/supervisor-only with SDS/TDS controls; do not generalize or expose as safe default.

hard_blocks.reason: Mixing bleach/acids/ammonia/oxidizers/reducers or unknown spotters can create toxic gases, corrosive reactions, or uncontrolled textile damage.
hard_blocks.required_display: Block until exact chemistry sequence, rinse/neutralization, SDS/TDS compatibility, PPE, and authority are reviewed.

hard_blocks.reason: Heat can set protein stains and can worsen unknown stains before identification/pretest.
hard_blocks.required_display: Stop or revise to cool/controlled pretest path before procedural guidance.

hard_blocks.reason: Unknown fiber/dye/trim plus aggressive chemistry or heat is a damage/claim risk; pretest and authority gate required.
hard_blocks.required_display: Requires supervisor review, hidden-area pretest, and documented stop conditions before staff-facing use.

hard_blocks.reason: Leather/suede/finish systems are high variance and claim-sensitive; plant-local shortcuts must not become general guidance.
hard_blocks.required_display: Supervisor/specialist review; preserve refusal/escalation and customer approval notes.

hard_blocks.reason: Dye movement/color correction is claim-sensitive and often irreversible; requires strict authority and expectation copy.
hard_blocks.required_display: No removal promise; show uncertainty, pretest, approval/waiver, and escalation path.

hard_blocks.reason: Overconfident copy violates TASK-145 copy rules and increases claim risk.
hard_blocks.required_display: Replace with safest-next-step language, uncertainty note, stop conditions, and no guarantee.

review_required_patterns.reason: Anecdote/habit is signal, not source-backed guidance.
Plant-local preference must not masquerade as central/source-backed guidance.
Moderate/high-risk procedural guidance needs pretest/default stop conditions.

public_copy_rules: Do not present Dan Eisen as public authority, partner, validator, reviewer, method, or certification path.
Do not collapse authority_class/risk_tier/review_status into a generic verified badge.

capture_semantics.rule: Unsafe classifier matches can downgrade/quarantine only. They must not promote, mark reviewed, or auto-reject at capture.
